patch.value: Changelog regen LAST, PR, bot review loop until clean, merge, close GH issues, Sentry+telemetry verification

Agent C (test): pm-vcr2 robust --add via dedicated flags/--add-json, pm-p86h --run selectors
Agent B (read surface): pm-ojpq context completion+recent sections, pm-awfr list parent projection, pm-eaer aggregate --completion

value.author: codex-impl
value.text: Mutation-surface specialist read-only pass: pm-xnkd close --duplicate-of, pm-p9hw create --parent fail-fast/default escape hatch, and pm-esf6 root --id-only are not implemented in current branch. close.ts/register-mutation.ts have no duplicateOf/--duplicate-of path; create.ts still uses settings.validation.parent_reference with default governance parent_reference=warn and tests assert warning behavior; global contracts/main/MCP/completions expose --no-changed-fields/fullChangedFields only, no --id-only. Expected follow-up surfaces: src/cli/commands/close.ts, src/cli/register-mutation.ts, src/cli/commands/create.ts, src/core/item/parent-reference-policy.ts, src/core/shared/constants.ts, src/cli/main.ts, src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts, src/mcp/server.ts, src/cli/commands/completion.ts, tests/fixtures/contracts/full.json, docs/COMMANDS.md, docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md, and focused unit/integration/MCP regressions.

value.author: codex-impl
value.text: Read-surface inspection: pm-awfr is implemented via DEFAULT_COMPACT_LIST_FIELDS including parent and has unit coverage. pm-ojpq is only partially present: hierarchy/progress completion-style stats exist, but high_level entries lack children_total/children_closed/completion_pct and recently_created/unparented sections are absent from section types, defaults, builders, and renderers. pm-eaer is not implemented: aggregate has no --completion option, no completion counters/pct fields, no registration/contracts/completion/docs/tests. No files edited by specialist.

value.author: codex-impl
value.text: Linked-test specialist read-only pass: pm-vcr2/GH-191 and GH-193 are partially implemented via --add-json parser/wiring, but the GH-191 two-token --add command UX/guidance is not implemented. pm-p86h/GH-194 selectors are partially implemented via src/core/test/run-selectors.ts and runTest selection metadata. Specialist tsc check failed at src/cli/commands/test.ts optional linkedTest.command passed to string-only safety helpers. Remaining gaps noted: selector/add-json tests, background arg propagation for selectors, contracts/completions/docs/full.json refresh.

value.author: codex-impl
value.text: Evidence: implemented linked-test --add-json for complex command metadata, pm test --run selectors (--match/--only-index/--only-last) with selection metadata and background arg preservation, and aggregate --completion progress counters. Focused gates passed: tsc --noEmit; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/linked-test-parsers.spec.ts tests/unit/test-command.spec.ts tests/unit/completion-command.spec.ts tests/unit/contracts-command.spec.ts tests/unit/runtime-schema-command-flags.spec.ts; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/aggregate-command.spec.ts tests/unit/completion-command.spec.ts; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/release-readiness-runtime.spec.ts; pnpm contracts:check. PM-owned linked tests passed after setting the contracts gate to tracker context. Manual temp-dir smoke passed for init/create/test --add-json/test --run --match/aggregate --completion with isolated PM_PATH and PM_GLOBAL_PATH. Wider gates passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (149 files, 2645 tests), pnpm quality:static, pnpm security:scan, pnpm audit --audit-level low, pnpm changelog:pm:check with pm-changelog@2026.6.10, pm health --check-only --summary --json, pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift (history drift ok; pre-existing resolution metadata warnings remain).

value.author: codex-impl
value.text: Review response evidence: addressed Gemini review findings by using Object.hasOwn for --add-json key reads, rejecting empty numeric strings, requiring positive integer timeout_seconds, requiring --match/--only-index/--only-last to be paired with --run, and normalizing aggregate completion statuses against the runtime registry. Verification passed: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/linked-test-parsers.spec.ts tests/unit/test-command.spec.ts tests/unit/aggregate-command.spec.ts (92 tests); pnpm contracts:check; pnpm changelog:pm:check && pnpm contracts:check with pm-changelog@2026.6.10; pnpm security:scan.

value.author: codex-impl
value.text: Review response evidence: addressed follow-up Gemini/CodeRabbit findings by preserving numeric onlyIndex values in command wiring, exposing pm test --list in bash/zsh/fish completions, exposing aggregate --completion in zsh completion, adding aggregate completion other counts for non-open/non-active/non-done statuses, and adding the aggregate completion action schema property. Verification passed: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/aggregate-command.spec.ts tests/unit/completion-command.spec.ts tests/unit/contracts-command.spec.ts tests/unit/runtime-schema-command-flags.spec.ts tests/unit/test-command.spec.ts tests/unit/linked-test-parsers.spec.ts (208 tests); pnpm contracts:check; pnpm changelog:pm:check && pnpm contracts:check with pm-changelog@2026.6.10; pnpm security:scan.

Implemented close --duplicate-of, create --allow-missing-parent with strict default parent validation, and global/MCP id-only mutation output.
Implemented context high-level child completion counters plus recently_created and unparented sections; prior list parent and aggregate completion work remains in this combined lineage.

Focused tests, contracts, coverage, static quality, docs links, security, audit, changelog, health, validation, and isolated temp smoke all passed; validation has pre-existing resolution warnings only.

value.author: codex-impl
value.text: Evidence: completed remaining pm SDK/CLI primitives bundle and tracker plan steps. Manual isolated temp smoke passed for create --json --id-only, strict missing parent rejection, --allow-missing-parent, close --duplicate-of metadata, and context recently_created/unparented sections. Verification passed: npm install -g .; pm --version 2026.6.9; node -v v25.9.0; pnpm -v 10.33.4; pnpm build; pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; focused mutation/context tests; pnpm contracts:check; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (149 files, 2650 tests); pnpm quality:static; pnpm quality:docs-links; pnpm security:scan; pnpm audit --audit-level low; pnpm changelog:pm:check with pm-changelog@2026.6.10; pm health --check-only --summary --json; pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift (history drift ok, pre-existing closed-item resolution warnings remain).

value.author: codex-impl
value.text: Review response evidence: addressed Gemini feedback on PR #198 by moving duplicate self-validation before item scans, tracking duplicate fallback fields precisely so changed_fields only reports actual mutations, and rendering malformed recently_created timestamps as unknown. Verification passed: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/close-command.spec.ts tests/unit/context-command.spec.ts (58 tests); pnpm quality:static; pnpm security:scan; pnpm changelog:pm:check with pm-changelog@2026.6.10.

value.author: codex-impl
value.text: Review response evidence: addressed follow-up Gemini feedback on PR #198 by guarding recently_created sort against missing legacy timestamps and rejecting circular duplicate references when a duplicate target already points back to the closing item. Verification passed: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/close-command.spec.ts tests/unit/context-command.spec.ts (60 tests); pnpm quality:static; pnpm security:scan; pnpm changelog:pm:check with pm-changelog@2026.6.10.

value.author: codex-impl
value.text: Review response evidence: addressed latest Gemini feedback on PR #198 by detecting duplicate_of cycles through the full target chain and making RecentContextItem.created_at optional to match legacy-safe rendering/sorting. Verification passed: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/close-command.spec.ts tests/unit/context-command.spec.ts (61 tests); pnpm quality:static; pnpm security:scan; pnpm changelog:pm:check with pm-changelog@2026.6.10.
